title: The Obstacle Is the Way
author: Ryan Holiday
subline: Perception. Action. Will. The Stoic trilogy.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A wall = THE OBSTACLE. Three red arrows have been driven INTO it. The wall has been conquered, but it still stands. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif">
    <!-- The wall: a 720x480 block filled with hairlines (brick texture) -->
    <g>
      <rect x="-360" y="-240" width="720" height="480" fill="#0a0a0a" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
      <!-- Brick hairlines -->
      <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1">
        <line x1="-360" y1="-160" x2="360" y2="-160"/>
        <line x1="-360" y1="-80" x2="360" y2="-80"/>
        <line x1="-360" y1="0" x2="360" y2="0"/>
        <line x1="-360" y1="80" x2="360" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="-360" y1="160" x2="360" y2="160"/>
        <!-- Staggered verticals -->
        <line x1="-200" y1="-240" x2="-200" y2="-160"/>
        <line x1="-40" y1="-240" x2="-40" y2="-160"/>
        <line x1="120" y1="-240" x2="120" y2="-160"/>
        <line x1="280" y1="-240" x2="280" y2="-160"/>
        <line x1="-280" y1="-160" x2="-280" y2="-80"/>
        <line x1="-120" y1="-160" x2="-120" y2="-80"/>
        <line x1="40" y1="-160" x2="40" y2="-80"/>
        <line x1="200" y1="-160" x2="200" y2="-80"/>
        <line x1="-200" y1="-80" x2="-200" y2="0"/>
        <line x1="-40" y1="-80" x2="-40" y2="0"/>
        <line x1="120" y1="-80" x2="120" y2="0"/>
        <line x1="280" y1="-80" x2="280" y2="0"/>
        <line x1="-280" y1="0" x2="-280" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="-120" y1="0" x2="-120" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="40" y1="0" x2="40" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="200" y1="0" x2="200" y2="80"/>
        <line x1="-200" y1="80" x2="-200" y2="160"/>
        <line x1="-40" y1="80" x2="-40" y2="160"/>
        <line x1="120" y1="80" x2="120" y2="160"/>
        <line x1="280" y1="80" x2="280" y2="160"/>
        <line x1="-280" y1="160" x2="-280" y2="240"/>
        <line x1="-120" y1="160" x2="-120" y2="240"/>
        <line x1="40" y1="160" x2="40" y2="240"/>
        <line x1="200" y1="160" x2="200" y2="240"/>
      </g>
    </g>
    <!-- Three RED arrows driven INTO the wall from above, slightly fanned -->
    <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="4" fill="#fc1c46">
      <line x1="-160" y1="-380" x2="-200" y2="-180"/>
      <polygon points="-200,-180 -212,-220 -188,-200"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-400" x2="0" y2="-180"/>
      <polygon points="0,-180 -16,-220 16,-220"/>
      <line x1="160" y1="-380" x2="200" y2="-180"/>
      <polygon points="200,-180 188,-200 212,-220"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Three stoic disciplines labels below -->
    <g font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em" text-anchor="middle">
      <text x="-160" y="320">PERCEPTION</text>
      <text x="0" y="320">ACTION</text>
      <text x="160" y="320">WILL</text>
    </g>
    <!-- OBSTACLE whisper above the wall -->
    <text x="0" y="-440" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">THE OBSTACLE</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A brick wall = THE OBSTACLE. Three red arrows have been driven INTO it from above (the three Stoic disciplines: Perception, Action, Will). 240px whisper title at the top. The wall stands; the arrows are how you USE it.
